<file>
00001| import { useState, useCallback } from 'react'
00002| import { config } from '@/config'
00003| 
00004| interface ZapperToken {
00005|   baseToken: {
00006|     name: string
00007|     symbol: string
00008|     address: string
00009|     imgUrl: string
00010|     network: string
00011|   }
00012|   balance: number
00013|   balanceUSD: number
00014| }
00015| 
00016| interface ZapperPortfolioResponse {
00017|   totals: {
00018|     total: number
00019|   }
00020|   tokenBalances: Array<{
00021|     token: ZapperToken
00022|   }>
00023| }
00024| 
00025| const ZAPPER_NETWORK_TO_CHAIN_ID: Record<string, number> = {
00026|   'ETHEREUM_MAINNET': 1,
00027|   'BASE_MAINNET': 8453,
00028|   'ARBITRUM_MAINNET': 42161,
00029|   'POLYGON_MAINNET': 137,
00030|   'OPTIMISM_MAINNET': 10,
00031|   'BINANCE_SMART_CHAIN_MAINNET': 56,
00032| }
00033| 
00034| /**
00035|  * Hook for fetching portfolio data from Zapper
00036|  */
00037| export function useZapperPortfolio() {
00038|   const [data, setData] = useState<ZapperPortfolioResponse | null>(null)
00039|   const [isLoading, setIsLoading] = useState(false)
00040|   const [error, setError] = useState<Error | null>(null)
00041| 
00042|   const fetchPortfolio = useCallback(async (
00043|     walletAddress: string
00044|   ): Promise<ZapperPortfolioResponse> => {
00045|     setIsLoading(true)
00046|     setError(null)
00047| 
00048|     try {
00049|       const apiKey = config.zapper.apiKey
00050|       if (!apiKey) {
00051|         throw new Error('Zapper API key not configured')
00052|       }
00053| 
00054|       const query = `
00055|         query Portfolio($addresses: [Address!]!) {
00056|           portfolio(addresses: $addresses) {
00057|             totals {
00058|               total
00059|             }
00060|             tokenBalances {
00061|               token {
00062|                 baseToken {
00063|                   name
00064|                   symbol
00065|                   address
00066|                   imgUrl
00067|                   network
00068|                 }
00069|                 balance
00070|                 balanceUSD
00071|               }
00072|             }
00073|           }
00074|         }
00075|       `
00076| 
00077|       const response = await fetch('https://public.zapper.xyz/graphql', {
00078|         method: 'POST',
00079|         headers: {
00080|           'Content-Type': 'application/json',
00081|           'x-zapper-api-key': apiKey,
00082|         },
00083|         body: JSON.stringify({
00084|           query,
00085|           variables: {
00086|             addresses: [walletAddress],
00087|           },
00088|         }),
00089|       })
00090| 
00091|       if (!response.ok) {
00092|         throw new Error(`Zapper API error: ${response.statusText}`)
00093|       }
00094| 
00095|       const result = await response.json()
00096| 
00097|       if (result.errors) {
00098|         throw new Error(`Zapper GraphQL error: ${result.errors[0]?.message}`)
00099|       }
00100| 
00101|       const portfolioData = result.data.portfolio
00102| 
00103|       setData(portfolioData)
00104|       return portfolioData
00105|     } catch (err) {
00106|       const error = err instanceof Error ? err : new Error('Failed to fetch Zapper portfolio')
00107|       setError(error)
00108|       throw error
00109|     } finally {
00110|       setIsLoading(false)
00111|     }
00112|   }, [])
00113| 
00114|   return {
00115|     data,
00116|     isLoading,
00117|     error,
00118|     fetchPortfolio,
00119|     ZAPPER_NETWORK_TO_CHAIN_ID,
00120|   }
00121| }
00122| 
</file>
